items.title: Embarrassment of riches.
items.description: Embarrassment of riches. But looks like we might hit 9M soon. Should we reset the ChatGPT Work and Codex usage again or give it some space?
items.description_zh: 富贵之耻。但看起来我们可能很快就会达到 900 万。我们应该再次重置 ChatGPT Work 和 Codex 使用情况还是给它一些空间？

items.title: Or… what if we gave you $100 in Codex credits if you tell us what you love about GPT-5.6…
items.title_zh: 或者……如果您告诉我们您喜欢 GPT-5.6 的哪些方面，我们会为您提供 100 美元的 Codex 积分，会怎样……
items.description: Or… what if we gave you $100 in Codex credits if you tell us what you love about GPT-5.6 Sol or why you switched? Tweet it, claim your gift, enjoy more usage. First 10k get the free tokens! https://t.co/8mU93eA13i https://t.co/8FfAGx68wR
items.description_zh: 或者……如果您告诉我们您喜欢 GPT-5.6 Sol 的哪些方面或者您为何更换，我们会为您提供 100 美元的 Codex 积分，结果会怎样？发推文，领取你的礼物，享受更多使用。前 10k 即可获得免费代币！ https://t.co/8mU93eA13i https://t.co/8FfAGx68wR

items.title: Here you are!
items.description: Here you are! Thinking I am about to announce a reset. But no. I’m just scrolling twitter and looking for feedback on ChatGPT Work. What should we improve?
items.description_zh: 给你！我想我即将宣布重置。但没有。我只是滚动 Twitter 并寻找有关 ChatGPT Work 的反馈。我们应该改进什么？

items.description: Tomorrow, I’m sharing a new video on how I use ChatGPT Work (also known as Codex 😅) to do almost everything on my computer. I’ll cover my complete setup in 7 steps below, from choosing the right GPT-5.6 model to managing email, calendar,…

items.title: One of the many properties that code has that makes it highly amenable to agents is that…
items.title_zh: 代码具有的众多属性使其非常适合代理，其中之一是……
items.description: One of the many properties that code has that makes it highly amenable to agents is that you can more or less quickly test it. You can either go see if the application works manually, or you can actually run a test on what you built. Most…
items.description_zh: 代码具有的众多属性使其非常适合代理，其中之一是您可以或多或少地快速测试它。您可以手动查看应用程序是否可以运行，也可以对您构建的内容进行实际运行测试。最多…
